chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-53 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 23-01-2024 M/s Ali Gul Abbasi and Muhammad Zuhaib Azam Rajput, Advocates for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Zubair Malik, Advocate for respondent No.1. Mr. Zeeshan Haider Qureshi, Law Officer of ECP along with Ghulam Abbas Tunio, Returning Officer NA-200. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, D.A.G for Pakistan. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G for Sindh. ***** In response to order dated 18.01.2024, learned counsel for respondent No.1 has filed statement along with documents showing withdrawal of nomination form of respondent No.1 dated 12.01.2024, within schedule. Returning Officer present in Court has confirmed this fact. Learned counsel for petitioner is satisfied and this petition having become infructuous as cause of action to challenge subject form is no more available is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
